mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BOARD_REPLY R JOIN TB_BOARD B ON R.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.WRITER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.REG_DT >= SYSDATE - 7

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT U.USER_NM AS lawyerName, (SELECT CODE_NM FROM TB_COM_CODE WHERE GRP_CODE = 'CASE_STEP' AND DTL_CODE = CR.PROGRESS_CODE) AS status, TO_CHAR(CR.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, '법률상담' AS category -- 카테고리는 TB_BOARD나 별도 컬럼이 필요하나 일단 고정값 예시 FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM CR JOIN TB_LAWYER_INFO L ON CR.LAWYER_NO = L.USER_NO JOIN TB_USER U ON L.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE CR.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY CR.REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.TITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(B.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BOARD_REPLY WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS replyCount FROM TB_BOARD B WHERE B.WRITER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY B.REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT U.USER_NM || ' 변호사 상담' AS title, TO_CHAR(CR.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_val, -- DTO 필드명이 date라면 별칭 주의 '#3b82f6' AS color FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM CR JOIN TB_USER U ON CR.LAWYER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE CR.USER_NO = #{userNo}
